ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: Choose which nodes from your canvas you want to convert into the target document. You can select all nodes, only selected nodes, or filter by color tags.
ast.target: 选择您想要转换为目标文档的画布节点。您可以选择所有节点、仅选中的节点，或按颜色标签筛选。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Makes metadata from embedded documents usable in target document
ast.target: 使嵌入文档中的元数据在目标文档中可用

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Makes connections descriptions usable in target document
ast.target: 使连接描述在目标文档中可用

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: User confirmation is not needed to overwrite existing target documents
ast.target: 覆盖现有目标文档时无需用户确认

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Include YAML frontmatter from embedded documents
ast.target: 包含嵌入文档的 YAML 前置内容

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 包含画布边（连接）的标签

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Overwrite existing target documents without confirmation
ast.target: 无需确认即可覆盖现有目标文档

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: this is not a canvas file

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: You have selected 'Convert selected nodes only' but no nodes are selected. Please select nodes or choose another conversion mode.
ast.target: 您已选择“仅转换选中的节点”，但未选择任何节点。请选择节点或选择其他转换模式。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: You have selected 'Convert color tagged nodes' but no color is selected. Please select a color or choose another conversion mode.
ast.target: 您已选择“转换颜色标记的节点”，但未选择任何颜色。请选择一种颜色或选择其他转换模式。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: this is not a canvas2document target file
ast.target: 这不是一个 canvas2document 目标文件

ast.name: name
ast.source: Step 1 - Convert canvas to a longform document
ast.target: 步骤 1 - 将画布转换为长文档

ast.name: name
ast.target: 步骤 2 - 清除 canvas2document 目标文档
